candidates.why: Explicit total current assets line on the balance sheet; exact match to ACT.
Balancing row, not the reported total; inferior to the explicit total.
Non-current assets, not current assets.

variables.notes: Selected the explicit reported total current assets line.

candidates.why: Explicit balance-sheet cash and cash equivalents line; best match for CHE.

candidates.row_label: Cash in hand and at banks
candidates.why: Alternative cash label that may be used in some periods; close synonym under IFRS/local presentation.

candidates.row_label: Cash and cash equivalents on 31 Dec
candidates.why: Cash flow statement ending cash, but balance sheet cash line is preferred for CHE.

final_choice.row_label: Cash in hand and at banks

variables.notes: Priority list reflects likely label variation across years; balance-sheet labels preferred over cash-flow ending cash.

candidates.why: Explicit total current liabilities line on the balance sheet; best match to LCT.

candidates.row_label: Trade creditors and other current liabilities
candidates.why: A major component/subtotal of current liabilities, but not the full total because provisions and interest-bearing liabilities are listed separately.
Balancing row, not the reported total.

variables.notes: Selected the explicit reported total current liabilities line.

candidates.why: Appears within current liabilities section and excludes lease liabilities, making it the cleanest observed short-term debt proxy.
Current financing liability total, but likely includes finance lease liabilities, which baseline STD should exclude.
Semantically ideal for current maturities, but preview shows no values and it may be supplemental/unpopulated here.

variables.notes: Current debt is ambiguous: 'Interest-bearing liabilities' likely includes leases, which should be excluded. Chose 'Loans' as the cleanest non-lease current debt line, but manual review is warranted.

candidates.why: Explicit short-term income taxes payable line; best match to taxes payable/current tax liabilities.
Also a current tax liability label and may be the label used in some periods.
Non-current/deferred tax item, not taxes payable.

variables.notes: Priority list captures apparent label variation for current tax payables across years.

candidates.why: Best available reported balance-sheet line corresponding to property, plant and equipment on a net basis.
Gross tangible assets would be less preferred than the reported net tangible assets total.

candidates.row_label: Right of Use Tangible Assets - Capital/Finance Lease - Net
candidates.why: Lease right-of-use asset component only, not total PPE.

variables.notes: Under this presentation, 'Tangible assets' is the closest reported total/net PPE line.

candidates.why: Explicit total assets line; exact match to AT.

variables.notes: Selected the explicit reported total assets line.

candidates.row_label: Net cash flows from operating activities
candidates.why: Explicit net cash flow from operating activities line; exact match to OANCF.

candidates.row_label: Cash flow before changes in working capital
candidates.why: Operating cash flow pre-working-capital, not final operating cash flow.

final_choice.row_label: Net cash flows from operating activities

variables.notes: Selected the explicit operating cash flow total.
